title: An Act to Impose a Vehicle Weight Limit on Route 46 in the Town of Eddington
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 4, 2025
last_house_action: 1/16/2025 - Received by the Clerk of the House on January 16, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
last_senate_action: 3/4/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
